name: MailerCloud Email Marketing API
what_it_does: Email marketing platform with REST API — enabling list management, campaign creation, email automation, and transactional email with affordable pricing for small businesses, with API for contact synchronization and campaign automation.
use_cases: Syncing contact lists from CRM to MailerCloud via API for targeted campaigns
Creating and sending email campaigns programmatically via REST API
Managing subscriber lists and segments with API-driven automation
Querying campaign performance metrics (opens, clicks, bounces) via API
Triggering transactional emails from application events via API
not_for: Complex behavioral email automation (use Customer.io or Klaviyo)
Large enterprise email with advanced analytics (use Salesforce Marketing Cloud)
High-volume transactional email without marketing features (use SendGrid or Mailgun)
best_when: A small business or startup wants affordable email marketing with basic API access for contact sync and campaign management without complexity.
avoid_when: You need advanced segmentation, behavioral triggers, AI-powered content optimization, or enterprise-grade deliverability services.

auth.notes: API key from MailerCloud account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Webhook for campaign events.

pricing.paid_tiers: From $9/month for 5,000 contacts; scales with contact count
pricing.notes: Generous free tier. Contact-based pricing. Indian company. API on all plans including free. Affordable for small businesses in emerging markets. Standard email marketing features. Good for bootstrapped startups.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for contacts, lists, campaigns, and reports. API key auth. Webhook for campaign events. Basic documentation. Indian company — smaller API footprint than Mailchimp or SendGrid. Free tier includes API access.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact upsert by email idempotent. Campaign creation creates new campaigns. List management idempotent by ID. Campaign sends not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Less comprehensive documentation than larger email platforms
Indian company — data may reside in India by default
Rate limits not publicly documented — discover through usage
Free tier is generous but may have sending restrictions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliant. Indian company data residency. API key auth — no scope granularity. Standard email platform security. Smaller security team than major providers.
